title: Welcome
body: Posts live in the repository’s posts/ folder (one JSON file each), with posts/manifest.json listing them. From Backstage you can publish with a GitHub token—no git commands on your laptop. GitHub still records a commit when you publish.
zhBody: 文章保存在仓库的 posts/ 目录下（每篇一个 JSON），由 posts/manifest.json 索引。在 Backstage 用 GitHub 令牌即可从浏览器发布，不必在本地执行 git。发布时 GitHub 仍会生成一次提交。
